ai_summary: **Executive Summary**  Kirloskar Industries Limited (KIL) has reported a routine compliance update regarding its material subsidiary, Kirloskar Ferrous Industries Limited (KFIL). KFIL has published the mandatory notice to its members concerning its upcoming Annual General Meeting (AGM), including details for e-voting and the record date. This document reflects standard corporate governance and shareholder communication; it presents no material financial impacts or immediate red flags.
